docstrings.CloseSpider: An extension that forces spiders to be closed after certain conditions are met.
docstrings.CloseSpider.error_count: Handle spider error signals to track failure and response counts.
docstrings.CloseSpider.from_crawler: Create an instance of CloseSpider from the crawler crawler.
docstrings.CloseSpider.item_scraped: Increment the item count for the spider when an item is scraped.
docstrings.CloseSpider.item_scraped_no_item: Update the item count for the spider when an item is scraped without a timeout.
docstrings.CloseSpider.page_count: Track the number of response and request objects received by the spider.
docstrings.CloseSpider.spider_closed: Clean up tasks when the spider is closed.
docstrings.CloseSpider.spider_opened: Initialize the timeout task when the spider is opened.
docstrings.CloseSpider.spider_opened_no_item: Start a looping call to monitor item production for the spider.
